title: nauclea elmeri
intro: Nauclea elmeri, also known as Kala meri or Kala meri tree, is a species of plant in the Rubiaceae family native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of alkaloids and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Nauclea elmeri are believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating malaria and other infectious diseases. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be administered orally to harness its medicinal properties.
